observations.value:
GET /search?q= always returns HTTP 200 with 'No results found.' error message, regardless of the query string or authentication state. For example, GET /search?q=test, GET /search?q=a, GET /search?q=widget, GET /search?q=shirt, GET /search?q=* (with and without Cookie: session=ok) all return the same body: '

No results found.

'. The search endpoint appears completely broken — it never returns any results for any input.
